# Prism

> Conversation signals for LLM apps. Score every turn, recommend the next action, and optionally monetize when the moment is right.

Prism (prismpublication.com) helps teams that already run chatbots and AI assistants decide what to do next in a conversation: clarify, retrieve docs, escalate to a human, change tone, recommend a product, or show a partner offer.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://prismpublication.com/): Prism Signals overview.
- [Signals](https://prismpublication.com/signals): Turn scoring API for intent, confidence, emotion, stage, topic, and safety.
- [Product](https://prismpublication.com/product): Full platform overview.
- [Use cases](https://prismpublication.com/use-cases): Supported chatbot types and integration patterns.
- [For Publishers](https://prismpublication.com/publishers): Ad monetization for chatbot operators.
- [For Advertisers](https://prismpublication.com/advertisers): Intent-level targeting inside live chatbot conversations.
- [Interactive Demo](https://prismpublication.com/demo): Simulated chatbot flow.
- [Documentation](https://prismpublication.com/docs): SDK reference and integration guides.
- [Blog](https://prismpublication.com/blog): Strategy, monetization, and product updates.
- [Ad Policy](https://prismpublication.com/ad-policy): Content and category restrictions.
- [Company](https://prismpublication.com/company): About Prism.
- [Contact](https://prismpublication.com/contact): Talk to the team.

## Key Facts

- Primary product: Prism Signals (conversation decisioning for LLM apps)
- Secondary product: Contextual ad marketplace for AI chat
- Supported stacks: OpenAI / GPT, LangChain, Rasa, custom AI agents, customer support bots, e-commerce assistants
- Signals: intent, confidence, emotion, stage, topics, safety flags, recommended action
- Targeting: Real-time conversation context (no profile-based tracking)
- Privacy: Contextual signals only; GDPR / CCPA aligned
- Integration: SDK-first, REST `/api/signals/score`, same auth as ads

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://prismpublication.com/sitemap.xml): Full URL index.
- [Robots](https://prismpublication.com/robots.txt): Crawl policy.
